headline: Arista (ANET) Shares Higher After Jim Cramer Said It Made Sense In January 2025
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the Jim Cramer’s Biggest Quantum Computing & Data Center Stock Hits. Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) provides routers, switches, and other products and services to data centers. Its shares are up by 32% over the past year and by 12.9% since Cramer’s comments. Arista Networks, Inc.
